rulings.Case Title: PAUL O'GRADY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for MAR. 16, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with final leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege a viable cause of action. Trial is continued to September 28, 2020. If the tentative ruling is contested, parties are encouraged to appear by telephone. = (501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: CYNTHIA JONES VS. THE ESTATE OF JOSIE STAMPS, ET AL.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for MAR. 16, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT SCOTT HENDLER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to April 24, 2020 on Court's own motion. If parties stipulate to a different hearing date after April 24, 2020, parties may notify the Court at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org by 8:00 a.m. on March 16, 2020. No appearance required. Please be advised that this e-mail address is not regularly monitored and no other communications with the Court are allowed via this e-mail. = (501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: ANDINA PROPERTY LLC VS. LAURA FOX ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion/Verified Petition Fo Plaintiff For Writ Of Mandamus (Ccp1085); Declaration Of Daniel M. Bornstein
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for MAR. 16, 2020 line 5. PLAINTIFF ANDINA PROPERTY LLC's Motion/Verified Petition of Plaintiff For Writ Of Mandamus (Ccp1085) continued to April 10, 2020. Moving party to provide a supplemental brief re: this Court's authority to determine the propriety of the removal to the Tax Court. Supplemental brief to be filed and served no later than March 30, 2020. Defendant may file a supplemental opposition no later than April 8, 2020. In the alternative, Plaintiff may seek remand determination from the Tax Court and file a Notice of Remand no later than April 8, 2020. = (501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: CORAZON TRISSEL VS. ADAM CAICEDO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories And Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for MAR. 16, 2020 line 8. PLAINTIFF CORAZON TRISSEL's Motion For An Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories And Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant to provide complete verified responses without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $900 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. If the tentative ruling is contested, parties are encouraged to appear by telephone.= (501/SKF)
